logic: 分组1 oc_rate后: min(oc_rate.invoice_date) (yyyy-MM-dd格式) (转换为yyyyMMdd)
分组1 oc_rate后:  sum(oc_rate.amount + oc_rate.vat_amount) group by oc_rate.client_id, oc_rate.invoice_no
优先级如下(如为空按优先级取值)

source: 除了N9*(BM,MB,BN,CN,FN)按照下面的Mapping实现, 最后保留一个占位处理.
logic: Other than the below N9 fields (BM,MB,BN,CN,FN) , send back all N9 information from 304, N9* 保留转换占位处理

sample: N3*3 SENTOSA GATEWAY*ST. JAMES POWER STATION

logic: 分组1 oc_rate后: 合并oc_rate.x_client_address1,oc_rate.x_client_address2之间用空格隔开(空不参与合并), 最后截取前55个字符.
合并ocean.shipper_address_1,ocean.shipper_address_2, ocean.shipper_address_3, ocean.shipper_address_4 之间用空格隔开(空不参与合并), 最后截取前55个字符.

sample: N1*ST*Dyson Operations Pte Ltd. C/O EV Cargo Logistics*93*31221000~

logic: 合并ocean.consignee_address_1,ocean.consignee_address_2, ocean.consignee_address_3, ocean.consignee_address_4 之间用空格隔开(空不参与合并), 最后截取前55个字符.
分组1 oc_rate后: 合并oc_rate.x_client_address1,oc_rate.x_client_address2之间用空格隔开(空不参与合并), 最后截取前55个字符.
Example: YANTIAN, GD, CHINA > YANTIAN  (only capture the text before the first ",")
DTM (DTM01,DTM02, DTM03) 数据, 如果DTM02为null或者空字符, 整组不生成
ocean_milestone[code=IFFDEP].est_date不为空(null或者空字符串) Hard Code: "139"
DTM01=139此值为: ocean_milestone[code=IFFDEP].est_date (yyyy-MM-dd格式)转换为 yyyyMMdd格式
DTM02为空, 值为空. DTM02不为空, 此值为空或者null, 此值用0000
DTM01=139: ocean_milestone[code=IFFDEP].est_time (HH:MM格式)转换为 HHMM格式
ocean.fport_of_discharge_exp (截取第一个逗号前的值, 没有逗号直接返回)
Example: ROTTERDAM, ZH, NL > ROTTERDAM  (only capture the text before the first ",")
DTM01=139: ocean.m_eta (DDMMYYYY格式)转换为 yyyyMMdd格式
R4*E 和下面的DTM转换都保留占位
if ocean.loadterm 不等于 LCL, 生成N7这组节点
分组2 oc_container后:  oc_container.ctnr (截取前四个字符)
Example: OOLU1234567 > OOLU (Take the first 4 character)
分组2 oc_container后: oc_container.ctnr (截取后8个字符)
OOLU1234567 > 1234567 (Take the remaining characters after 4th character)
分组2 oc_container后:  sum(oc_container.grs_kgs) group by oc_container.serial_no, oc_container.ctnr
分组2 oc_container后:  sum(oc_container.cbm) group by oc_container.serial_no, oc_container.ctnr
分组2 oc_container后:  sum(oc_container.qty) group by oc_container.serial_no, oc_container.ctnr

sample: Unit of measure - BOX, CTN, PCS, PKG
logic: 分组2 oc_container后:  max(oc_container.unit) group by oc_container.serial_no, oc_container.ctnr
max(oc_container.unit) 为null或者不是CTN, PKG就用PCS
分组1 oc_rate后:  sum(oc_rate.amount + oc_rate.vat_amount) group by oc_rate.invoice_no, oc_rate.client_id
分组3 oc_container2后:  sum(oc_container.cbm) group by oc_container.serial_no
分组1 oc_rate后: sum(oc_container.qty) group by oc_rate.client_id, oc_rate.invoice_no
Total number of segments included in a transaction set including ST and SE segments
